questions: thanda te ki bhabe survive korbo
answers: Hypothermia happens when body temperature drops below 95°F (35°C). Symptoms include shivering, confusion, slurred speech, and drowsiness. Move the person to warmth, remove wet clothes, and wrap in blankets.
Hypothermia er symptoms holo kanpuni, confused feel kora, speech jorie asha, ar ghum ghum lagha. Groom jaygay niye jan, veja kapor khule din, blanket diye wrap korun, ar warm drinks din.

To treat hypothermia: Get indoors, replace wet clothing with dry layers, wrap in blankets, give warm non-alcoholic drinks. Warm the body gradually — don't use direct heat like hot water as it can cause shock.

Hypothermia serious condition — hospital e niye jawa uchit. Prothome warm shelter e niye jan, dry kapor porayen, body core (chest, neck, head) prothome warm korun. Alcohol deben na — eta body ar thanda kore.
